description.en: Airway blocked by a foreign object.

question.id: Apakah korban sadar?
question.en: Is the victim conscious?

explanation.id: Periksa apakah korban merespon gerakan atau suara Anda.
explanation.en: Check if the victim responds to movements or your voice.

question.id: Apakah korban masih bisa batuk atau berbicara?
question.en: Can the victim still cough or speak?

explanation.id: Tanyakan 'Apakah Anda tersedak?' Jika korban bisa menjawab atau batuk keras, penyumbatan bersifat parsial.
explanation.en: Ask 'Are you choking?' If they can answer or cough loudly, the blockage is partial.

question.id: Dorong korban untuk terus batuk
question.en: Encourage the victim to keep coughing

explanation.id: Pantau kondisinya secara ketat. Jangan memukul punggung jika mereka bisa batuk karena dapat mendorong benda lebih dalam.
explanation.en: Monitor closely. Do not give back blows if they can cough, as this may push the object deeper.

question.id: Berikan 5 tepukan punggung & 5 hentakan perut (Heimlich)
question.en: Give 5 back blows & 5 abdominal thrusts (Heimlich)

explanation.id: Condongkan korban ke depan. Tepuk punggung di antara belikat. Jika gagal, lingkarkan tangan di perut korban dari belakang, tekan kuat ke dalam dan ke atas.
explanation.en: Lean victim forward. Strike back between shoulder blades. If failing, wrap arms around abdomen, pull sharply inward and upward.

question.id: Panggil 112 dan lakukan Resusitasi Jantung Paru (RJP)
question.en: Call 112 and start CPR immediately

explanation.id: Baringkan korban. Sebelum memberi napas buatan, periksa apakah benda asing terlihat di mulut dan ambil jika mudah dijangkau. Lakukan RJP.
explanation.en: Lay victim down. Before rescue breaths, look in the mouth and remove the foreign object if visible. Perform CPR.

question.id: Penyumbatan teratasi. Istirahatkan korban.
question.en: Blockage cleared. Rest the victim.

explanation.id: Pastikan korban bernapas normal. Bawa ke dokter jika dilakukan hentakan perut untuk memeriksa cedera internal.
explanation.en: Ensure normal breathing. Seek medical advice if abdominal thrusts were done to check for internal injuries.

description.id: Kehilangan kesadaran sementara akibat kurangnya aliran darah ke otak.
description.en: Temporary loss of consciousness due to reduced blood flow to the brain.

question.id: Apakah korban masih bernapas?
question.en: Is the victim breathing?

explanation.id: Periksa pergerakan dada dan rasakan hembusan napas selama 10 detik.
explanation.en: Look for chest rise and feel for breath for 10 seconds.

question.id: Baringkan, tinggikan kaki 30 cm, longgarkan pakaian
question.en: Lay flat, elevate legs 30 cm, loosen clothes

explanation.id: Tinggikan kaki untuk mengalirkan darah kembali ke otak. Beri udara segar. Jangan beri makan atau minum sampai sadar sepenuhnya.
explanation.en: Elevate feet to restore blood flow to the brain. Provide fresh air. Do not give food or drink until fully conscious.

question.id: Hubungi 112 & Mulai RJP
question.en: Call 112 & Start CPR

explanation.id: Korban henti napas. Panggil ambulans segera dan gunakan bantuan Asisten RJP di aplikasi ini untuk memandu kompresi dada.
explanation.en: Victim has stopped breathing. Call ambulance immediately and use the CPR Assistant in this app to guide compressions.

question.id: Korban sadar. Dudukkan perlahan.
question.en: Victim is conscious. Sit up slowly.

explanation.id: Biarkan korban berbaring atau duduk santai selama 10-15 menit sebelum berdiri agar tidak pingsan lagi.
explanation.en: Let victim rest lying down or sitting for 10-15 minutes before standing to prevent recurrence.

question.id: Hubungi 112 & Baringkan Miring (Recovery Position)
question.en: Call 112 & Put in Recovery Position

explanation.id: Pingsan yang lama bisa menandakan kondisi medis serius. Posisikan korban miring agar jalan napas tetap aman dari muntahan.
explanation.en: Prolonged fainting may indicate a serious medical issue. Turn them onto their side to keep the airway clear of vomit.

description.id: Keluarnya darah dari pembuluh darah akibat luka.
description.en: Loss of blood from blood vessels due to injury.

question.id: Apakah pendarahan parah / menyembur?
question.en: Is the bleeding severe or spurting?

explanation.id: Pendarahan parah/arteri ditandai dengan semburan darah merah terang yang deras dan sulit berhenti.
explanation.en: Severe arterial bleeding is marked by rapid spurts of bright red blood that is hard to stop.

question.id: Tekan langsung luka dengan kain bersih & tinggikan
question.en: Apply direct pressure with clean cloth & elevate

explanation.id: Tekan kuat pada luka secara terus-menerus. Jika di kaki/tangan, angkat melebihi tinggi jantung korban. Hubungi 112.
explanation.en: Press firmly on the wound without stopping. If on a limb, lift it above heart level. Call 112.

question.id: Apakah luka berada di lengan atau kaki?
question.en: Is the wound located on an arm or leg?

explanation.id: Jika pendarahan parah pada ekstremitas tidak berhenti dengan tekanan langsung, tourniquet mungkin diperlukan untuk menyelamatkan nyawa.
explanation.en: If severe limb bleeding cannot be stopped by direct pressure, a tourniquet may be needed to save life.

question.id: Gunakan Tourniquet 5cm di atas luka
question.en: Apply Tourniquet 5cm above the wound

explanation.id: Ikat kencang menggunakan sabuk/kain tebal dan batang pemutar. Putar hingga pendarahan berhenti. Catat waktu pemasangan tourniquet.
explanation.en: Bind tightly using a belt/thick cloth and windlass rod. Twist until bleeding stops. Record the application time.

question.id: Tambah kain penekan & pertahankan tekanan kuat
question.en: Add more padding & maintain firm pressure

explanation.id: Jangan angkat kain pertama. Tambahkan kain bersih di atasnya dan tekan lebih kuat. Tunggu bantuan ambulans.
explanation.en: Do not remove the first cloth. Add more clean layers on top and apply harder pressure. Wait for the ambulance.

question.id: Bersihkan luka dengan air mengalir & perban
question.en: Clean wound with running water & bandage

explanation.id: Cuci luka selama beberapa menit untuk membuang kotoran. Keringkan, oleskan antiseptik, dan tutup dengan plester atau perban bersih.
explanation.en: Wash the wound for a few minutes to remove dirt. Dry it, apply antiseptic, and cover with a plaster or clean bandage.

question.id: Pasang perban penekan & pantau tanda syok
question.en: Apply pressure bandage & monitor for shock

explanation.id: Ikat kain penekan dengan perban elastis. Periksa denyut nadi ujung jari. Jaga tubuh korban tetap hangat.
explanation.en: Tie the padding down with an elastic bandage. Check pulse at the fingertip. Keep the victim warm.

description.id: Kerusakan kulit akibat panas, bahan kimia, atau radiasi.
description.en: Damage to skin caused by heat, chemicals, or radiation.

question.id: Apakah disebabkan bahan kimia atau listrik?
question.en: Is it caused by chemicals or electricity?

explanation.id: Luka bakar kimia atau listrik membutuhkan tindakan keselamatan khusus sebelum merawat luka.
explanation.en: Chemical or electrical burns require special safety actions before treating the wound.

question.id: Aliri air 20 menit (kimia) atau periksa jalan napas (listrik)
question.en: Flush with water for 20 mins (chemical) or check airway (electric)

explanation.id: Bahan kimia: Guyur terus dengan air mengalir. Listrik: Pastikan listrik mati, lalu periksa pernapasan. Hubungi 112.
explanation.en: Chemicals: Flush continuously with running water. Electricity: Ensure power is off, then check breathing. Call 112.

question.id: Apakah luka bakar parah (melepuh besar, kulit hitam/putih)?
question.en: Is the burn severe (large blisters, black/white skin)?

explanation.id: Luka bakar parah merusak lapisan kulit dalam, wajah, tangan, atau area luas (> lebar telapak tangan korban).
explanation.en: Severe burns damage deep skin layers, affect the face/hands, or cover a large area (> width of the victim's palm).

question.id: Dinginkan dengan air mengalir, tutup longgar & ke RS
question.en: Cool with running water, cover loosely & go to hospital

explanation.id: Dinginkan dengan air mengalir suhu ruang selama 10 menit. Jangan gunakan es. Tutup longgar dengan plastik pembungkus bersih (plastic wrap) atau kain steril. Hubungi 112.
explanation.en: Cool with room-temp running water for 10 mins. Do not use ice. Cover loosely with clean plastic wrap or sterile cloth. Call 112.

question.id: Aliri air dingin 10-15 menit & beri pelembab
question.en: Flush cool water 10-15 mins & apply moisturizer

explanation.id: Dinginkan area luka bakar dengan air mengalir bersih. Setelah dingin, oleskan gel lidah buaya atau pelembab. Jangan pecahkan gelembung lepuhan.
explanation.en: Cool the burn under clean running water. Once cooled, apply aloe vera gel or moisturizer. Do not pop any blisters.

description.id: Aliran listrik melintasi tubuh yang dapat menghentikan jantung.
description.en: Electric current passing through the body, which can stop the heart.

question.id: Apakah korban masih menempel dengan sumber listrik?
question.en: Is the victim still in contact with the electric source?

explanation.id: PERINGATAN: Jangan sentuh korban jika mereka masih menempel dengan aliran listrik hidup, atau Anda akan ikut tersengat.
explanation.en: WARNING: Do not touch the victim if they are still in contact with live current, or you will also be shocked.

question.id: Matikan sekring listrik / dorong dengan kayu kering
question.en: Shut off main power / push away with dry wood

explanation.id: Matikan pemutus arus (MCB) segera. Jika tidak bisa, gunakan benda non-logam kering (seperti gagang sapu kayu) untuk menjauhkan sumber listrik.
explanation.en: Shut off the circuit breaker (MCB) immediately. If impossible, use a dry, non-metal object (like a wooden broom handle) to push the wire away.

question.id: Apakah korban masih bernapas?
question.en: Is the victim breathing?

explanation.id: Periksa napas dengan mendekatkan telinga Anda ke hidung korban sambil melihat gerakan dadanya.
explanation.en: Check breathing by placing your ear near their nose and watching chest movements.

question.id: Baringkan miring & rawat luka bakar listrik
question.en: Lay in recovery position & treat electrical burns

explanation.id: Miringkan korban agar jalan napas aman. Periksa luka bakar di tempat masuk dan keluarnya arus listrik. Bawa ke RS segera.
explanation.en: Put them in recovery position. Check for burns where current entered and exited the body. Go to hospital immediately.

question.id: Hubungi 112 & lakukan RJP segera
question.en: Call 112 & start CPR immediately

explanation.id: Sengatan listrik sering menghentikan detak jantung. Berikan kompresi dada yang konsisten dengan bantuan Asisten RJP di aplikasi ini.
explanation.en: Electric shocks often cause cardiac arrest. Administer continuous chest compressions using the CPR Assistant.

description.id: Gangguan aktivitas listrik otak yang memicu kejang otot hebat.
description.en: Disruption of electrical brain activity causing severe muscle spasms.

question.id: Apakah korban sedang kejang saat ini?
question.en: Is the victim currently having a seizure?

explanation.id: Korban kejang biasanya kaku, gemetar hebat seluruh tubuh, mata melotot, dan tidak merespon.
explanation.en: A seizing victim is usually rigid, shaking violently, with eyes rolled back, and unresponsive.

question.id: Lindungi kepala, singkirkan benda tajam. JANGAN tahan korban!
question.en: Protect head, clear area. DO NOT restrain!

explanation.id: Letakkan jaket/bantal di bawah kepala. JANGAN masukkan benda apa pun (termasuk sendok/jari) ke dalam mulut. JANGAN menahan gerakan kejang korban.
explanation.en: Place a folded jacket/pillow under their head. DO NOT put anything in their mouth. DO NOT hold the victim down.

question.id: Baringkan miring (Recovery Position) & pantau napas
question.en: Turn onto side (Recovery Position) & monitor breathing

explanation.id: Setelah kejang, korban akan lemas dan bingung. Baringkan miring agar air liur/muntah keluar dari mulut dan tidak menyumbat jalan napas.
explanation.en: After a seizure, the victim will be exhausted and confused. Lay them on their side to prevent choking on saliva/vomit.

question.id: Hubungi 112 segera
question.en: Call 112 immediately

explanation.id: Kejang berulang atau kejang yang berlangsung lebih dari 5 menit merupakan kondisi darurat medis yang mengancam jiwa.
explanation.en: Repeated seizures or a single seizure lasting more than 5 minutes is a life-threatening medical emergency.

description.id: Penyumbatan mendadak aliran darah ke otot jantung.
description.en: Sudden blockage of blood flow to the heart muscle.

question.id: Apakah korban sadar?
question.en: Is the victim conscious?

explanation.id: Serangan jantung ditandai nyeri dada parah seperti ditekan, menjalar ke lengan kiri atau rahang, sesak napas, dan keringat dingin.
explanation.en: A heart attack causes severe crushing chest pain, radiating to the left arm or jaw, shortness of breath, and cold sweat.

question.id: Dudukkan setengah berbaring, longgarkan pakaian, beri Aspirin
question.en: Sit in a semi-reclined position, loosen clothes, give Aspirin

explanation.id: Dudukkan korban di lantai dengan punggung bersandar agar beban jantung berkurang. Longgarkan kancing kerah. Jika ada, berikan tablet Aspirin (300mg) untuk dikunyah. Hubungi 112.
explanation.en: Position victim on the floor leaning against a wall to reduce heart strain. Loosen tight collars. Have them chew one Aspirin (300mg) if available. Call 112.

question.id: Hubungi 112 segera & mulai RJP
question.en: Call 112 immediately & start CPR

explanation.id: Jika korban pingsan dan tidak bernapas normal, segera mulai kompresi dada sedalam 5-6 cm secara cepat dan konstan.
explanation.en: If the victim collapses and stops breathing normally, immediately start fast and deep chest compressions (5-6 cm depth).

description.id: Penyumbatan atau pecahnya pembuluh darah di otak.
description.en: Blockage or rupture of blood vessels in the brain.

question.id: Lakukan tes FAST: Wajah, Lengan, atau Bicara tidak normal?
question.en: Perform FAST test: Face, Arms, or Speech abnormal?

explanation.id: F (Face): Minta tersenyum, apakah separuh wajah terkulai? A (Arm): Minta angkat kedua tangan, apakah satu tangan lunglai? S (Speech): Minta bicara, apakah pelo/cadel?
explanation.en: F (Face): Ask to smile, does one side droop? A (Arm): Ask to lift both arms, does one drift down? S (Speech): Ask to speak, is their speech slurred?

question.id: Catat waktu gejala mulai & Hubungi 112
question.en: Record time symptoms started & Call 112

explanation.id: T (Time): Waktu sangat penting dalam penanganan stroke untuk mencegah kerusakan otak permanen. Baringkan korban dengan kepala sedikit ditinggikan (30 derajat). Jangan beri makanan/minuman.
explanation.en: T (Time): Time is critical to prevent permanent brain damage. Lay them down with head slightly elevated (30 degrees). Do not give food or drink.

question.id: Periksa sakit kepala hebat, mati rasa sebelah tubuh, atau rabun mendadak
question.en: Check for sudden severe headache, numbness on one side, or double vision

explanation.id: Jika gejala-gejala ini muncul mendadak secara tiba-tiba tanpa sebab jelas, segeralah hubungi layanan darurat 112 atau bawa ke rumah sakit.
explanation.en: If these symptoms appear suddenly without clear cause, immediately call 112 or transport them to the hospital.

description.id: Cedera akibat gigi hewan yang berisiko infeksi atau racun.
description.en: Injuries from animal teeth, risking infection or poisoning.

question.id: Apakah dicurigai berbisa (ular/laba-laba) atau rabies (anjing liar/kelelawar)?
question.en: Is it suspected venomous (snake/spider) or rabies (wild dog/bat)?

explanation.id: Gigitan ular berbisa menimbulkan nyeri hebat, bengkak cepat, dan kebiruan. Gigitan anjing liar berisiko menularkan rabies.
explanation.en: Venomous snakebites cause severe pain, rapid swelling, and bruising. Stray dog bites carry a rabies transmission risk.

question.id: Imobilisasi anggota tubuh, cuci bersih & segera ke UGD
question.en: Immobilize the limb, wash & go to ER immediately

explanation.id: Untuk gigitan ular: Jangan ikat kencang (torniket) kecuali atas instruksi dokter, dan JANGAN hisap racunnya. Pasang bidai agar sendi tidak bergerak untuk memperlambat penyebaran racun. Hubungi 112.
explanation.en: For snakebites: Do not tie a tourniquet unless instructed, and DO NOT suck out venom. Apply a splint to keep the limb still and slow venom spread. Call 112.

question.id: Cuci sabun 15 menit, antiseptik, perban
question.en: Wash with soap for 15 mins, antiseptic, bandage

explanation.id: Cuci luka gigitan dengan air bersih mengalir dan sabun selama minimal 15 menit untuk membilas air liur hewan. Oleskan antiseptik dan tutup dengan kasa steril.
explanation.en: Wash the bite wound under running water with soap for at least 15 minutes to clear saliva. Apply antiseptic and cover with sterile gauze.

description.id: Retak atau patahnya struktur tulang akibat benturan.
description.en: Cracking or breaking of bone structure due to impact.

question.id: Apakah tulang menembus kulit (terbuka) / berdarah hebat?
question.en: Is the bone protruding (open fracture) or bleeding heavily?

explanation.id: Patah tulang terbuka berisiko tinggi infeksi tulang berat. Pendarahan hebat di dekat tulang patah harus segera dihentikan.
explanation.en: An open fracture carries a high risk of bone infection. Heavy bleeding near the broken bone must be controlled.

question.id: Tekan sekitar luka (JANGAN tekan tulang!), tutup kasa & hubungi 112
question.en: Apply pressure around (NOT on bone!), cover gauze & call 112

explanation.id: Gunakan perban bersih. Tekan kuat area sekitar tulang yang mencuat untuk menghentikan pendarahan. JANGAN dorong tulang kembali masuk. Tutup longgar dengan kain steril.
explanation.en: Use clean dressings. Press firmly on the area around the protruding bone to stop bleeding. DO NOT push the bone back in. Cover loosely with sterile cloth.

question.id: Imobilisasi dengan bidai & kompres es
question.en: Immobilize with a splint & apply cold compress

explanation.id: Sangga bagian atas dan bawah sendi yang patah dengan papan/majalah gulung sebagai bidai. Ikat longgar agar peredaran darah lancar. Tempelkan es yang dibungkus handuk.
explanation.en: Support joints above and below the fracture using boards/rolled magazines as splints. Tie loosely to preserve blood flow. Apply towel-wrapped ice.
